title: Testing fetch with MSW
scenario_context: App uses fetch; tests mock fetch directly, lose typing and miss request shape bugs.
what_should_be_tested: Network mocking at the request-handler level.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. MSW intercepts at the network layer.
2. Handlers in shared file.
3. server.use() per test for overrides.

title: Testing components that read window.location
scenario_context: Component reads window.location.search. jsdom has location but tests can't change it easily.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Use jsdom's URL via Object.defineProperty.
2. Prefer reading via react-router useSearchParams.
3. If direct: test with multiple URLs via configure.

title: Testing recursive endpoints (e.g., tree traversal)
scenario_context: Folder tree endpoint loads recursively. Bug: cycle in folder graph causes infinite request loop.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Insert a cycle in test DB.
2. Endpoint must detect and return error or stop at depth N.

title: Property: rate limiter never exceeds limit
scenario_context: Custom rate limiter. Bug: under high concurrency, briefly over-allowed.
what_should_be_tested: Across arbitrary request schedules, count <= max per window.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Fire N concurrent requests with FakeClock.
2. Property: accepted requests <= max.

title: Killing equality-operator mutations
scenario_context: `if (a === b)` mutated to `!==`. Tests assert only when equal; mutant survives on non-equal.
what_should_be_tested: Both equality and inequality paths exercised.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Test true and false branches with explicit cases.

title: Test parallelism: when isolate is harmful
scenario_context: Tests need to share an expensive setup (DB pool). isolate makes each file re-setup.
what_should_be_tested: Shared setup faster; per-file isolation when needed.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. globalSetup for one-time heavy setup.
2. isolate:true preserves module isolation; only globals shared.
3. Connection pools are global singletons reused across files via env vars.

title: Testing visibility API behavior
scenario_context: Component pauses on tab hidden. jsdom doesn't dispatch visibilitychange.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Override document.visibilityState.
2. Dispatch event.

title: Testing screen reader-only content
scenario_context: Visually-hidden labels for screen readers. CSS class .sr-only. Bug: refactor used display:none, hiding from SR.
what_should_be_tested: sr-only content is in DOM and accessible.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Use clip pattern for sr-only.
2. Test: getByText finds it even when visually hidden.

title: Testing CORS preflight cache control
scenario_context: Preflight cached by browser. Bug: Access-Control-Max-Age set to 0, preflight per request.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Max-Age 600s reasonable.
2. Test preflight returns it.

title: Final: building a test-driven engineering culture
scenario_context: Tests viewed as overhead. Coverage drops. Bugs ship.
what_should_be_tested: Process: every PR includes tests for new behavior; reviewers reject PRs without them.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. PR template requires tests checkbox.
2. CODEOWNERS requires test review.
3. Coverage gate (test-022) catches regressions.
4. Rituals: pair on tests; demo failing → passing in standups.
5. Tests are the team's collective memory; treat as production code.
what_would_break_without_this_test: Culture rots; tests skipped; bugs ship; team blames testing.
ci_considerations: Cultural change is slow; codify in process.

title: Testing async error boundaries with try/catch
scenario_context: Async function in handler throws; never caught.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. await expect().rejects.toThrow.
2. Specific error type asserted.

title: Testing component with imperative dialog API
scenario_context: <dialog> native element. tests can't call .showModal().
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. jsdom has dialog but missing methods.
2. Polyfill methods or test via UI.

title: Testing event-source subscription cleanup
scenario_context: SSE client never closes; connections leak.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. EventSource has .close().
2. Test verifies it called.

title: Property: state machine valid transitions
scenario_context: Order state machine. Bug: pending→shipped allowed (skipping paid).
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Define allowed transitions.
2. Property: any disallowed throws.

title: Killing increment/decrement mutants
scenario_context: `i++` mutated to `i--`. Loop test passes if count just verified > 0.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Assert exact loop result.

title: CI test parallelism vs flakiness
scenario_context: More workers = more flakes from race conditions.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Find true isolation level.
2. Shared state = bug to fix, not config to tune.

title: Testing components that use document.title
scenario_context: Page sets document.title. Tests don't verify, regressions hard to catch.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Assert document.title after render.

title: Testing cookie expiration
scenario_context: Session cookie expires after 1h. Bug: max-age set to 1s (typo).
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Cookies via context.cookies().
2. Assert expires reasonable.

title: Testing pagination next/prev links
scenario_context: Response includes next/prev URLs. Bug: prev on first page → 404.
what_should_be_tested: First page has no prev; last has no next.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Test page 1: no prev.
2. Test last page: no next.

title: Closing: testing as a continuous discipline
scenario_context: Project starts with great tests; over years, suite rots. Tests skipped, mocks proliferate, mutation score drops.
what_should_be_tested: Ongoing test hygiene reviews; rotate test cop role; quarterly health checks.
test_strategy_reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Quarterly: run audit script (pyramid, flake, mutation).
2. Rotate 'test cop' role weekly — owns hygiene.
3. Tests are infrastructure; budget engineering time for them.
4. Measure: pyramid balance, flake rate, mutation score, runtime.
what_would_break_without_this_test: Test suite rots; team loses trust; rebuild from scratch.
